---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tiaradwptr
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tiara@leaf.fm
---

Hi, I'm Tiara — a data scientist / analyst working across Python and R.

This site collects write-ups of projects I've built or analyses I've run. Each
post is a reproducible document: the code blocks you see are the actual code
that produced the figures and tables alongside them.

## Tools I reach for

- **Python:** pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib, polars
- **R:** tidyverse, ggplot2, tidymodels
- **Storage & pipelines:** Snowflake, dbt, dlt, Airflow
- **Reporting:** Quarto, Rmarkdown, Jupyter
